description: Ambiances sonores bouclées (Mode Spectacle). Générées via ElevenLabs Sound Generation API (eleven_text_to_sound_v2 + loop:true, 22s). Un MP3 par univers, bundlé dans l'app pour zéro coût runtime.

entries.prompt: Deep space ambience, soft distant cosmic hum, gentle sparkle of distant stars, ethereal synth pad, very calm and peaceful, no musical melody, loopable
Underwater ocean ambience, soft muffled waves and gentle bubbles, distant whale calls very faint, calm deep water, peaceful and mysterious, loopable
Enchanted forest at night, gentle breeze through leaves, distant soft owl hoots, subtle magical sparkles, crickets very quiet, peaceful and mysterious, loopable
Prehistoric jungle ambience, distant large footsteps very faint, gentle tropical wind through giant ferns, soft bird-like calls far away, calm and warm, loopable
Fairy tale castle ambience, soft distant harp notes, gentle wind through stone halls, twinkling magical sparkles, warm and dreamy, loopable
City skyline at night soft ambience, gentle wind at altitude, very distant muffled city hum, subtle energetic pulse, calm but heroic, loopable
Wooden ship at sea, gentle creaking of planks, soft waves lapping hull, distant seagull far away, calm ocean breeze, peaceful adventure, loopable
Futuristic spaceship interior, soft electronic hum, gentle computer beeps very subtle, distant mechanical pulse, calm sci-fi ambience, loopable
Dreamlike magical ambience, soft twinkling sparkles, gentle ethereal pad, subtle wind chimes very distant, warm and wondrous, loopable
